violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open bags of food in walk in freezer.--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Observed box of food on floor in walk in freezer.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Observed doors and sides of appliances need to be cleaned.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Observed towel dispenser at hand sink in rear of kitchen was out of towels at time of inspection. COS
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
